creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi Boris,

logcheck 1.2.69 has a new logtail2 script that's used instead of
logtail, but the patch file extra-patch-src__logcheck.in in the PR
switches it back to logtail.

Do you know if logtail2 is preferred, and if so, some additional files
in src/detectrotate need to be installed.

Thank you,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin
